name: Broiled Eggplant Parmigiana
recipeIngredient: 3 medium Unpeeled Tomatoes (About Cut Into 12 (1/2 in.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat a large nonstick skillet with cooking spray and add oil. Place over medium-high heat until hot.
2. Add onions and garlic; sauté 5 minutes or until tender.
3. Add tomatoes, oregano, salt, pepper, and bay leaf. Cover and cook about 25 minutes or until tomatoes are tender. Remove from heat and discard the bay leaf.
4. Process tomato mixture with a knife blade until smooth. Transfer to a 12 x 8 x 2 inch baking dish.
5. Dip eggplant slices in beaten egg white, then dredge in breadcrumbs. Place on rack of a broiler pan coated with cooking spray.
6. Broil 4 inches from heat about 3 minutes on each side.
7. Arrange eggplant slices over the tomato mixture and bake at 450°F for 10 minutes.
8. Sprinkle with cheese and bake an additional 5 minutes or until lightly browned.
